mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS id, e.evaluator_name AS evaluatorName, e.evaluator_type AS evaluatorType, e.latest_version_id AS latestVersionId, COALESCE(v.version_no, 0) AS latestVersionNo, CASE WHEN COALESCE(v.version_no, 0) = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', v.version_no) END AS latestVersionName, e.description AS description, e.created_at AS createdAt, e.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_evaluator e LEFT JOIN eval_evaluator_version v ON e.latest_version_id = v.id WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND (#{evaluatorType} IS NULL OR e.evaluator_type = #{evaluatorType}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR e.evaluator_name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY e.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_evaluator WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (#{evaluatorType} IS NULL OR evaluator_type = #{evaluatorType}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR evaluator_name LIKE #{like})
SELECT id AS id, category_name AS categoryName, display_order AS displayOrder FROM eval_preset_evaluator_category ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT p.id AS id, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.evaluator_name AS evaluatorName, p.evaluator_type AS evaluatorType, p.description AS description FROM eval_preset_evaluator p LEFT JOIN eval_preset_evaluator_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE (#{categoryId} IS NULL OR p.category_id = #{categoryId}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR p.evaluator_name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY c.display_order ASC, p.display_order ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_preset_evaluator WHERE (#{categoryId} IS NULL OR category_id = #{categoryId}) AND (#{like} = '%%' OR evaluator_name LIKE #{like})

SELECT p.id AS id, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.evaluator_name AS evaluatorName, p.evaluator_type AS evaluatorType, p.description AS description, p.model_id AS modelId, p.prompt AS prompt, p.execute_code AS executeCode, p.score_min AS scoreMin, p.score_max AS scoreMax, p.pass_threshold AS passThreshold, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_preset_evaluator p LEFT JOIN eval_preset_evaluator_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{presetId}

SELECT id AS id, evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, version_no AS versionNo, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', version_no) END AS versionName, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS draft, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_evaluator_version WHERE evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY version_no ASC

SELECT e.id AS evaluatorId, e.evaluator_name AS evaluatorName, e.evaluator_type AS evaluatorType, e.description AS description, v.id AS versionId, v.version_no AS versionNo, CASE WHEN v.version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', v.version_no) END AS versionName, CASE WHEN v.version_no = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS draft, v.model_id AS modelId, v.prompt AS prompt, v.execute_code AS executeCode, v.score_min AS scoreMin, v.score_max AS scoreMax, v.pass_threshold AS passThreshold, v.created_at AS createdAt, v.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_evaluator_version v JOIN eval_evaluator e ON v.evaluator_id = e.id WHERE v.id = #{versionId} AND v.is_deleted = 0 AND e.is_deleted = 0
